model.sql:
WITH g10a_version_as_of_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }} VERSION AS OF 123
),
g10a_version_as_of_shaped AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    CAST(metric_value AS DOUBLE) AS metric_value,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts,
    123 AS as_of_version,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g10a_version_as_of_source
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts,
  as_of_version,
  load_dttm
FROM g10a_version_as_of_shaped

WITH g10b_timestamp_as_of_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }} TIMESTAMP AS OF '2018-10-18T22:15:12.013Z'
),
g10b_timestamp_as_of_shaped AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    CAST(metric_value AS DOUBLE) AS metric_value,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts,
    CAST('2018-10-18T22:15:12.013Z' AS TIMESTAMP) AS as_of_timestamp,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g10b_timestamp_as_of_source
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts,
  as_of_timestamp,
  load_dttm
FROM g10b_timestamp_as_of_shaped

WITH g10c_at_syntax_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}@v123
),
g10c_at_syntax_shaped AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    CAST(metric_value AS DOUBLE) AS metric_value,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts,
    123 AS as_of_version,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g10c_at_syntax_source
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts,
  as_of_version,
  load_dttm
FROM g10c_at_syntax_shaped

CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE target_catalog.target_schema.tbl_cdf_enabled_example
USING DELTA
TBLPROPERTIES (delta.enableChangeDataFeed = true)
AS
WITH g10n_cdf_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g10n_cdf_shaped AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    CAST(metric_value AS DOUBLE) AS metric_value,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g10n_cdf_source
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts,
  load_dttm
FROM g10n_cdf_shaped

WITH g10o_table_changes_raw AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts,
    _change_type,
    _commit_version,
    _commit_timestamp
  FROM table_changes('`target_catalog`.`target_schema`.`source_delta_table`', 0, 10)
),
g10o_table_changes_shaped AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    CAST(metric_value AS DOUBLE) AS metric_value,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts,
    _change_type,
    _commit_version,
    _commit_timestamp,
    CASE WHEN _change_type = 'delete' THEN true ELSE false END AS is_deleted,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g10o_table_changes_raw
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts,
  _change_type,
  _commit_version,
  _commit_timestamp,
  is_deleted,
  load_dttm
FROM g10o_table_changes_shaped
ORDER BY
  _commit_version,
  _commit_timestamp
